/usr/bin/ar qc out/libbinaryninjaapi.a CMakeFiles/binaryninjaapi.dir/activity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryninjaapi.dir/architecture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binaryninjaapi.dir/backgroundtask.cpp.o
